question: How many schools with an average score in Math greater than 400 in the SAT test are exclusively virtual?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.School) FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Virtual = 'F' AND T1.AvgScrMath > 400
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools s JOIN satscores ssc ON s.CDSCode = ssc.cds WHERE ssc.avgscrmath > 400 AND s.virtual = 'Y';

question: Which are the cards that have incredibly powerful foils.
gold_sql: SELECT id FROM cards WHERE cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL AND cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL
generated_sql: SELECT c.name, c.power, c.toughness FROM cards c WHERE c.hasFoil = TRUE AND c.power > 8 AND c.toughness > 8 ORDER BY c.power DESC, c.toughness DESC;

question: Which user has a higher reputation, Harlan or Jarrod Dixon?
gold_sql: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE DisplayName IN ('Harlan', 'Jarrod Dixon') AND Reputation = ( SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users WHERE DisplayName IN ('Harlan', 'Jarrod Dixon') )
generated_sql: SELECT u.DisplayName FROM users u WHERE u.Reputation > 1000 ORDER BY u.Reputation DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 2;

question: What is the ratio of customers who pay in EUR against customers who pay in CZK?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Currency = 'EUR', 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) / SUM(IIF(Currency = 'CZK', 1, 0)) AS ratio FROM customers
generated_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN t.CustomerID END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN t.CustomerID END), 0) AS ratio FROM transactions_1k t JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID;

question: Give the name of the league had the most goals in the 2016 season?
gold_sql: SELECT t2.name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.league_id = t2.id WHERE t1.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY t2.name ORDER BY SUM(t1.home_team_goal + t1.away_team_goal) DESC LIMIT 1
generated_sql: SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals FROM Match m JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id WHERE m.season = 2016 GROUP BY l.name ORDER BY total_goals DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many accounts who choose issuance after transaction are staying in East Bohemia region?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.A3 = 'east Bohemia' AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) AS number_of_accounts FROM account a JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE t.type = 'debit' AND d.A2 <= 1000000 AND d.A3 <= 1000000 AND d.A4 <= 1000000 AND d.A5 <= 1000000 AND d.A6 <= 1000000 AND d.A7 <= 1000000 AND d.A8 <= 1000000 AND d.A9 <= 1000000 AND d.A10 <= 1000000 AND d.A11 <= 1000000 AND d.A12 <= 1000000 AND d.A13 <= 1000000 AND d.A14 <= 1000000 AND d.A15;

question: Please list the reference names of the drivers who are eliminated in the first period in race number 20.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.driverRef FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 20 ORDER BY T1.q1 DESC LIMIT 5
generated_sql: SELECT d.driverRef FROM results r JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId WHERE r.raceId = 20 AND r.statusId = 4 AND r.position < 10 ORDER BY d.driverRef NULLS LAST;

question: What's Angela Sanders's major?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Angela' AND T1.last_name = 'Sanders'
generated_sql: SELECT m.link_to_major FROM member m WHERE m.first_name = 'Angela' AND m.last_name = 'Sanders';

question: Please list all the superpowers of 3-D Man.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = '3-D Man'
generated_sql: SELECT s.power_name FROM hero_power hp JOIN superpower s ON hp.power_id = s.id WHERE hp.hero_id = (SELECT id FROM superhero WHERE superhero_name = '3-D Man') ORDER BY s.power_name NULLS LAST;

question: Are there more in-patient or outpatient who were male? What is the deviation in percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Patient WHERE SEX = 'M'
generated_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND p.Admission IS NOT NULL THEN e.ID END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' THEN e.ID END), 0) AS male_patients_in_hospital_ratio FROM Examination e JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID WHERE p.Admission IS NOT NULL;

question: What is the most common bond type?
gold_sql: SELECT T.bond_type FROM ( SELECT bond_type, COUNT(bond_id) FROM bond GROUP BY bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(bond_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T
generated_sql: SELECT b.bond_type, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM bond b GROUP BY b.bond_type ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Please list the codes of the schools with a total enrollment of over 500.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CDSCode FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.`Enrollment (K-12)` + T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > 500
generated_sql: SELECT s.CDSCode FROM schools s WHERE s.Enrollment > 500;

question: What are the borderless cards available without powerful foils?
gold_sql: SELECT id FROM cards WHERE borderColor = 'borderless' AND (cardKingdomId IS NULL OR cardKingdomId IS NULL)
generated_sql: SELECT c.id, c.name FROM cards c WHERE c.borderColor IS NULL AND c.power < 7 AND c.hasFoil = TRUE AND c.availability = 'available' ORDER BY c.name NULLS LAST;

question: Please list the display names of all the users whose accounts were created in the year 2011.
gold_sql: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011'
generated_sql: SELECT u.DisplayName FROM users u WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM u.CreationDate) = 2011;

question: In 2012, who had the least consumption in LAM?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1
generated_sql: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Consumption FROM yearmonth ym JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31' AND c.Currency = 'LAM' ORDER BY c.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1;

question: In Scotland Premier League, which away team won the most during the 2010 season?
gold_sql: SELECT teamInfo.team_long_name FROM League AS leagueData INNER JOIN Match AS matchData ON leagueData.id = matchData.league_id INNER JOIN Team AS teamInfo ON matchData.away_team_api_id = teamInfo.team_api_id WHERE leagueData.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND matchData.season = '2009/2010' AND matchData.away_team_goal - matchData.home_team_goal > 0 GROUP BY matchData.away_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
generated_sql: SELECT t.team_long_name, SUM(m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals FROM Match m JOIN Team t ON m.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id WHERE m.league_id = 2010 AND m.country_id = 757071 GROUP BY t.team_long_name ORDER BY total_goals DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List out the no. of districts that have female average salary is more than 6000 but less than 10000?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.district_id)  FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T2.A11 BETWEEN 6000 AND 10000
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.district_id) FROM client c WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.district_id IN (SELECT a.district_id FROM account a JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id WHERE t.type = 'debit' AND t.amount > 6000 AND t.amount < 10000);

question: What is the surname of the driver with the best lap time in race number 19 in the second qualifying period?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.surname FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 19 ORDER BY T1.q2 ASC LIMIT 1
generated_sql: SELECT d.surname FROM lapTimes lt JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId JOIN qualifying q ON lt.raceId = q.raceId WHERE lt.raceId = 19 AND q.q2 = 2 ORDER BY lt.time ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Among the students from the Student_Club who attended the event "Women's Soccer", how many of them want a T-shirt that's in medium size?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.event_id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T1.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' AND T3.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' AND m.t_shirt_size = 'medium';

question: Among the superheroes with the super power of "Super Strength", how many of them have a height of over 200cm?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND T1.height_cm > 200
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero s WHERE s.height_cm > 200 AND s.superpower_id = (SELECT id FROM superpower WHERE power_name = 'Super Strength');

question: What is the percentage of female patient were born after 1930?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Birthday) > '1930' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Patient WHERE SEX = 'F'
generated_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.sex = 'F' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.birthday::DATE) > 1930 THEN e.id END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT e.id), 0) * 100 AS percentage FROM Examination e JOIN Patient p ON e.id = p.id;

question: Calculate the average number of oxygen atoms in single-bonded molecules.
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) FROM (SELECT T1.molecule_id, COUNT(T1.element) AS oxygen_count FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id  WHERE T2.bond_type = '-' AND T1.element = 'o'  GROUP BY T1.molecule_id) AS oxygen_counts
generated_sql: SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN a.element = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS average_oxygen_atoms FROM atom a JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

question: Among the schools with an SAT excellence rate of over 0.3, what is the highest eligible free rate for students aged 5-17?
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(CAST(T1.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE CAST(T2.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T2.NumTstTakr > 0.3
generated_sql: SELECT MAX(s.Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)) AS max_eligible_free_rate FROM satscores s JOIN schools e ON s.cds = e.CDSCode WHERE s.AvgScrRead > 0.3 AND s.AvgScrMath > 0.3 AND s.AvgScrWrite > 0.3 AND s.NumGE1500 > 0 AND e.Enroll (Ages 5-17) > 0;

question: List all the mythic rarity print cards banned in gladiator format.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.format = 'gladiator' AND T2.status = 'Banned' AND T1.rarity = 'mythic'
generated_sql: SELECT c.name FROM cards c JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.uuid WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.format = 'gladiator' AND l.status = 'banned' ORDER BY c.name NULLS LAST;

question: How many users last accessed the website after 2014/9/1?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM users WHERE date(LastAccessDate) > '2014-09-01'
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id) FROM users u WHERE u.LastAccessDate > '2014-09-01';

question: What was the average monthly consumption of customers in SME for the year 2013?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T2.Consumption) / 12 FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND T1.Segment = 'SME'
generated_sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', t.date) AS MONTH, AVG(t.amount) AS average_spending FROM transactions_1k t JOIN customers c ON t.customerid = c.customerid WHERE date_part('year', t.date) = 2013 AND c.segment = 'SME' GROUP BY MONTH;

question: What are the speed in which attacks are put together of the top 4 teams with the highest build Up Play Speed?
gold_sql: SELECT t1.buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id ORDER BY t1.buildUpPlaySpeed ASC LIMIT 4
generated_sql: SELECT t.team_long_name, t.team_api_id, t.team_fifa_api_id, ta.buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team t JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id ORDER BY ta.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 4;

question: How many male customers who are living in North Bohemia have average salary greater than 8000?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.A3 = 'north Bohemia' AND T2.A11 > 8000
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client c JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'M' AND c.district_id = 1 AND a.district_id = 1 AND AVG(a.amount) > 8000;

question: Please give the name of the race held on the circuits in Germany.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.country = 'Germany'
generated_sql: SELECT r.name FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE c.country = 'Germany';

question: Among the events attended by more than 10 members of the Student_Club, how many of them are meetings?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1  INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event GROUP BY T1.event_id  HAVING COUNT(T2.link_to_event) > 10 EXCEPT SELECT T1.event_name  FROM event AS T1  WHERE T1.type = 'Meeting'
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event e JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event WHERE e.type = 'meeting' GROUP BY e.event_id HAVING COUNT(a.link_to_member) > 10;
